evals.prompt: Draft a smoke-test plan for the checkout flow described in the notes.
evals.expected_output: An ordered plan naming each checkout scenario from the notes. Human-readable guide only — not graded.

assertions.name: covers-all-scenarios
assertions.description: The answer addresses every checkout scenario named in the reference notes.

assertions.name: no-invented-facts
assertions.description: The answer introduces no scenarios, fields, or systems absent from the reference notes (grounding).

evals.prompt: The notes mention no mobile client. Plan mobile checkout coverage anyway.
evals.expected_output: Uses the documented fallback instead of inventing mobile behavior. Not graded.

assertions.name: uses-documented-fallback
assertions.description: The answer applies the fallback the skill documentation prescribes and says so, rather than fabricating unsupported coverage.
